summary: v1.2 (Stripe checkout + landing /venda) tested end-to-end. All 8 backend pytests pass. All frontend flows validated: sales page renders all sections, Stripe redirect works, thank-you page handles all states, sidebar/bonus/calculator regressions pass, and old routes still load.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/leads accepts any string containing '@' and '.' — regex validation via EmailStr would be more robust (not blocking).
server.py: /api/webhook/stripe swallows raw error into HTTPException 400 — consider verifying signature explicitly and logging event.event_type for audit trail.
SalesPage.jsx uses alert() on checkout failure — replace with in-UI toast for better UX (minor).

ThankYou.jsx polls up to 8x with 2s interval (16s max). If Stripe redirect comes back before webhook processes, users see status-error unnecessarily; acceptable for test key but consider exponential backoff in prod.
seed_data_creation: Created test payment_transactions in MongoDB (5 pending TX with cs_test_ session IDs) and TEST_-prefixed leads via /api/leads. Safe to leave — all prefixed TEST_ or emergent test key.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints /packages, /leads, /leads/count, /checkout/session, /checkout/status/{id} all verified. Stripe integration uses sk_test_emergent and returns cs_test_ session IDs redirecting to checkout.stripe.com. Payment_transactions persisted with payment_status=pending. Landing /venda has data-testids: sales-page, hero-section, hero-cta, pains-section, solutions-section, testimonials-section, bonuses-section, urgency, pricing-section, pkg-{starter|complete|premium_plus}, btn-buy-{...}, checkout-email, faq-{0..5}, final-cta, final-cta-btn. ThankYou has status-checking/paid/pending/error. Calculator now double-writes to backend /api/leads + localStorage.
